function.name: importSkill
function.description: Import a skill from a local directory, .zip archive, or URL into the skills directory. The skill must contain a valid SKILL.md conforming to the agentskills.io specification.

Source.description: Path to a local skill directory, .zip archive, or a URL (http/https) pointing to a .zip to import.

Overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite an existing skill with the same name. Default false.
